title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 차량, 차량 부속구 또는 차량부품 (차량에 특히 적합하게 된 화재예방, 억제 또는 소화 A62C3/07)
title.en: VEHICLES, VEHICLE FITTINGS, OR VEHICLE PARTS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR (fire prevention, containment or extinguishing specially adapted for vehicles A62C0003070000)

definition.ko: 달리분류되지 않는 차량 또는 차량 부품 또는 액세서리 B60R16/00, B60R99/00 배치 광학적 시계 수단 B60R1/00 계단 또는 사다리 B60R3/00 배치 또는 적용 달리 분류되지 않는 전기 설비; 위생 설비 B60R16/00; B60R15/00 광고용 B60R13/00 윤활 시스템 또는 장치 B60R17/00 수하물 보관 또는 운반을 위한 부속구의 배치 B60R5/00 ~ B60R11/00 보호 또는 보안 차량 또는 승객에 대한 배치; 안전벨트 또는 차체 장치; 도난방지 장치 B60R19/00, B60R21/00; B60R22/00; B60R25/00 바디 마감재 B60R13/00 기타 차량 부속품 B60R99/00

title.ko: 광학적 보기 장치; 광학 이미지 캡처 시스템을 사용하는 운전자 또는 승객을 위한 실시간 보기 장치, 예. 차량 내부 또는 차량에서 사용하도록 특별히 제작된 카메라 또는 비디오 시스템
title.en: Optical viewing arrangements; Real-time viewing arrangements for drivers or passengers using optical image capturing systems, e.g. cameras or video systems specially adapted for use in or on vehicles

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 거울을 사용하는 광학 보기 장치와 광학 이미지 캡처 시스템을 사용하는 실시간 보기 장치를 포함한다, 예. 운전자나 승객을 돕기 위해 차량 내부 또는 차량에 있는 카메라 또는 비디오 시스템의 특수 조정. 여기서 "보기"는 거울, 카메라 등을 사용하여 운전자 또는 승객의 시각 보조를 의미한다.

title.ko: 백미러 장치(전망경 장치 B60R 1/10)
title.en: Rear-view mirror arrangements (periscope arrangements B60R0001100000)

title.ko: 차내에 설치하는 것(B60R 1/08이 우선)
title.en: mounted inside vehicle (B60R0001080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 차외에 설치하는 것(B60R 1/08이 우선)
title.en: mounted on vehicle exterior (B60R0001080000 takes precedence)
with remote control for adjusting position
by manually powered actuator
for adjusting the mirror relative to its housing
using cables
by electrically powered actuator
for adjusting the mirror relative to its housing
for retracting the mirror arrangements to a non-use position alongside the vehicle

title.ko: 과도한 외부의 힘에 유연하고 표시된 사용 위치를 제공하는 것(B60R 1/062가 우선)
title.en: yieldable to excessive external force and provided with an indexed use position (B60R0001062000 takes precedence)
easily removable; mounted for bodily outward movement, e.g. when towing
involving special optical features, e.g. avoiding blind spots
Front-view mirror arrangements; Periscope arrangements
Mirror assemblies combined with other articles, e.g. clocks
Real-time viewing arrangements for drivers or passengers using optical image capturing systems, e.g. cameras or video systems specially adapted for use in or on vehicles
for viewing an area outside the vehicle, e.g. the exterior of the vehicle
with a predetermined field of view
in front of the vehicle
to the sides of the vehicle
to the rear of the vehicle
providing all-round vision, e.g. using omnidirectional cameras
with an adjustable field of view
for viewing an area inside the vehicle, e.g. for viewing passengers or cargo
providing vision in the non-visible spectrum, e.g. night or infrared vision
providing stereoscopic vision

title.ko: 계단, 예. 발판(차량의 상부구조의 일부로서 만들어져 있는 것 B62D 25/22)
title.en: Arrangements of steps, e.g. running-boards (constructed as superstructure sub-units of road vehicles B62D0025220000)
Retractable steps
with provisions for shoe-scraping

title.ko: 트렁크, 여행용 가방 또는 이것과 유사한 것을 수용할 수 있는 크기의 차량내 칸막이 (화물운반차량에 있어서 주로 화물적재를 목적으로 한 것 B60P, 예비타이어 수납장치 B62D 43/06)
title.en: Compartments within vehicle body primarily intended or sufficiently spacious for trunks, suit-cases, or the like (primarily intended for stowing loads in load-transporting vehicles B60P;arrangements for stowing spare wheels B62D0043060000)
arranged at front of vehicle
arranged at rear of vehicle

title.ko: 여행용 가방보다 작은 승객의 소지품을 주로 의도한 차량내부의 수납 또는 보관용구 예. 여행용품 또는 지도(라디오, 텔레비젼, 전화 또는 그것과 유사한 것, 운전중에 조작하는 카메라의 설치, 공구 또는 예비부품 B60R 11/02; 쓰레기, 식품, 음료, 담배의 용기류 B60N 3/00)
title.en: Stowing or holding appliances inside of vehicle primarily intended for personal property smaller than suit-cases, e.g. travelling articles, or maps (for radio sets, television sets, telephones, or the like, mounting of cameras operative during drive, tools, or spare parts B60R0011020000-B60R0011060000;for receptacles for refuse, food, beverages, cigarettes B60N0003000000)
in a separate luggage compartment
in driver or passenger space
mounted on sun visor
mounted on or below dashboards
Disposition of racks, clips, or the like
for supporting hats, clothes or clothes hangers
for supporting umbrellas
for supporting weapons

title.ko: 수화물, 예. 화물, 스포츠용품 또는 이와 유사한 것을 운반 위한 차량 외부의 보조부품
title.en: Supplementary fittings on vehicle exterior for carrying loads, e.g. luggage, sports gear or the like
at the sides, e.g. on running-board

title.ko: 차량의 지붕과 결합된 캐리어(B60R 9/08이 우선)
title.en: Carriers associated with vehicle roof (B60R0009080000 takes precedence)
Carriers characterised by means to facilitate loading or unloading of the load, e.g. rollers, tracks, or the like
Carriers being adjustable or transformable, e.g. expansible, collapsible
Carriers characterised by article-gripping, -retaining, or -locking means
Carriers characterised by wind deflecting means

title.ko: 차량의 가로방향으로만 펴지는 부재로 구성된 캐리어(B60R 9/08이 우선)
title.en: Carriers comprising elongate members extending only transversely of vehicle (B60R0009080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 밀폐형의 캐리어, 예. 컨테이너, 상자(B60R 9/048이 우선)
title.en: Enclosure-type carriers, e.g. containers, boxes (B60R0009048000 takes precedence)
characterised by releasable attaching means between carrier and roof
at vehicle front or rear
specially adapted for sports gear
for cycles
for skis

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 물품의 보관 또는 지지장치
title.en: Arrangements for holding or mounting articles, not otherwise provided for
for radio sets, television sets, telephones, or the like; Arrangement of controls thereof
Mounting of cameras operative during drive; Arrangement of controls thereof relative to the vehicle

title.ko: 공구 또는 예비부품을 위한 것
title.en: for tools or spare parts (for spare wheels B62D0043000000)

title.ko: 차체의 마무리 가공, 표식, 장식을 위한 부재; 광고목적을 위한 장치 또는 개량
title.en: Elements for body-finishing, identifying, or decorating; Arrangements or adaptations for advertising purposes
Liners for load platforms or load compartments

title.ko: 트림몰딩; 선반(ledge); 월 라이너(wall liner); 루프 라이너(roof liner) (B60R 13/01이 우선)
title.en: Trim mouldings; Ledges; Wall liners; Roof liners (B60R0013010000 takes precedence)
Ornamental or guard strips; Ornamental inscriptive devices
Sealing strips

title.ko: 지붕 구조와 일체가 아닌 배수 또는 가이드 장치 (13/06이 우선, 보닛(bonnet), 리드(lids)를 위한 워터 디플렉터(water delfector) B62D 25/13)
title.en: Water drainage or guide means not integral with roof structure (B60R0013060000 takes precedence;water deflectors for bonnets or lids B62D0025130000)
Insulating elements, e.g. for sound insulation
Registration, licensing, or like devices
Arrangements or adaptations of sanitation devices
Washing facilities
Toilet facilities

Electric or fluid circuits specially adapted for vehicles and not otherwise provided for; Arrangement of elements of electric or fluid circuits specially adapted for vehicles and not otherwise provided for
electric
for transmission of signals between vehicle parts or subsystems
between relatively movable parts of the vehicle, e.g. between steering wheel and column
for supply of electrical power to vehicle subsystems
characterised by the use of electrical cells or batteries
for occupant comfort
Arrangement of batteries
for carrying-off electrostatic charges
fluid
Arrangements or adaptations of lubricating systems or devices
Systems, e.g. central lubrication systems

title.ko: 차륜 보호장치, 라디에이터 보호장치, 장해물 제거 장치, 충돌시의 완충장치(진흙받이 B62D)
title.en: Wheel guards; Radiator guards; Obstruction removers; Fittings damping bouncing force in collisions (mudguards B62D0025160000)

title.ko: 완충기, 즉 차량을 보호하고 또는 다른 차량 또는 물체로부터 충격을 받아들이거나 흡수하는 부재(수상선과 일체를 이루는 것 또는 그것에 특별히 적용되는 것 B63B 59/02)
title.en: Bumpers, i.e. impact receiving or absorbing members for protecting vehicles or fending off blows from other vehicles or objects (integral with waterborne vessels or specially adapted therefor B63B0059020000)

title.ko: 재료에 특징이 있는 것, 예. 복합물(19/18이 우선)
title.en: characterised by material, e.g. composite (B60R0019180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 1개 이상의 부분으로 이루어진 것(19/18이 우선)
title.en: formed from more than one section (B60R0019180000 takes precedence)
vertically spaced
having folding parts
having deflecting members, e.g. rollers, balls
Means within the bumper to absorb impact
containing gas or liquid, e.g. inflatable
containing cellular material, e.g. solid foam
Arrangements for mounting bumpers on vehicles
comprising yieldable mounting means
Metallic springs
Elastomeric material
Fluid shock absorbers
destroyed upon impact, e.g. one-shot type
Combinations of yieldable mounting means of different types
adjustably or movably mounted, e.g. horizontally displaceable for securing a space between parked vehicles
in the direction of an obstacle before a collision
extending primarily along the sides of, or completely encircling, a vehicle
Bumper guards
spring- or pivotally-mounted
combined with, or convertible into, other devices or objects, e.g. bumpers combined with road brushes, bumpers convertible into beds
with lights or registration plates
Radiator or grille guards

title.ko: 장애물 제거 또는 장애물 편향기(19/16, 21/34가 우선)
title.en: Obstruction removers or deflectors (B60R0019160000, B60R0021340000 take precedence)
Arrangements on high-riding vehicles, e.g. lorries, for preventing vehicles or objects from running thereunder

title.ko: 우발 사고 또는 교통 위기의 경우 승원 또는 보행자에 상처를 입히지 않도록 하기 위한 차량의 장치 또는 부품(차량에서 안전벨트 또는 신체용 장구 B60R 22/00; 불규칙적인 힘의 작용으로부터 승원자를 보호하기 위한 좌석, 예. 안전좌석 B60N 2/42, 차량의 조향핸들의 에너지흡수장치 B62D 1/11, 차량의 조향칼럼(columm)의 에너지흡수장치 B62D 1/19)
title.en: Arrangements or fittings on vehicles for protecting or preventing injuries to occupants or pedestrians in case of accidents or other traffic risks (safety belts or body harnesses in vehicles B60R0022000000;seats constructed to protect the occupant from the effect of abnormal g-forces, e.g. crash or safety seats, B60N0002420000;energy-absorbing arrangements for hand wheels for steering vehicles B62D0001110000;energy-absorbing arrangements for vehicle steering columns B62D0001190000)
Electrical circuits for triggering safety arrangements in case of vehicle accidents or impending vehicle accidents
including means for detecting collisions, impending collisions or roll-over
responsive to vehicle motion parameters
responsive to imminent contact with an obstacle
responsive to actual contact with an obstacle
including means for detecting the presence or position of passengers, passenger seats or child seats, e.g. for disabling triggering
including arrangements for providing electric power to the safety arrangements

title.ko: 승원용 안전가드 또는 부품
title.en: Occupant safety arrangements or fittings
Padded linings for the vehicle interior
associated with the instrument panel or dashboard
associated with the steering wheel, hand lever or column
Padded fittings, e.g. head rests, sun visors

title.ko: 안전네트; 투명시트, 커튼 또는 유사한 것, 예. 승원과 글래스 사이에 배치되는 것(21/11, 21/12, 21/16이 우선)
title.en: Safety nets, transparent sheets, curtains, or the like, e.g. between occupants and glass (B60R0021110000, B60R0021120000, B60R0021160000 take precedence)
movable from an inoperative to an operative position, e.g. in a collision
Control elements or operating handles movable from an operative to an out-of-the way position, e.g. switch knobs, window cranks
Overhead guards, e.g. against loads falling down
which protect the occupants against personal attack from the inside or the outside of the vehicle
Roll-over protection

title.ko: 충돌 또는 충돌이 임박할 때 팽창하기 위해 설계된 팽창가능한 승원 구속 또는 제어장치, 예. 공기백
title.en: Inflatable occupant restraints or confinements designed to inflate upon impact or impending impact, e.g. air bags
the inflatable member formed as a belt or harness or combined with a belt or harness arrangement

title.ko: 공기를 뺀 상태 또는 사용하지 않는 상태에서 공기주입식 요소를 저장하는 방식; 에어백 모듈 또는 요소의 장비를 위한 방식(arrangement)

Packaging straps or envelopes for inflatable members
in steering wheels or steering columns
in dashboards
in the lower part of dashboards, e.g. for protecting the knees
in vehicle seats

title.ko: 차량 옆판, 예. 문 (필러가 장착된 장치 B60R 21/213)

in vehicle roof frames or pillars
in roof panels
characterised by the covers for the inflatable member
with complex motion of the cover; Retraction under the lining during opening
comprising tether means for limitation of cover motion during deployment
characterised by a tear line for defining a deployment opening
Inflation fluid source retainers, e.g. reaction canisters; Connection of bags, covers, diffusers or inflation fluid sources therewith or together

title.ko: 공기주입 요소 (B60R 21/18이 우선)
title.en: Inflatable members (B60R0021180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 모양, 구성 또는 공간 배치를 특징으로 하는 것
title.en: characterised by their shape, construction or spatial configuration
Curtain-type airbags deploying mainly in a vertical direction from their top edge

title.ko: 복수의 개별 구획으로 구성된 것; 2개 이상의 백과 같은 요소, 다른 것들 내부의 것 (B60R 21/232이 우선)
title.en: comprising a plurality of individual compartments; comprising two or more bag-like members, one within the other (B60R0021232000 takes precedence)
Expansion control features
Tethers
Tear seams
Soft diffusers
characterised by their material
characterised by the way they are folded
characterised by their venting means

title.ko: 팽창 액체 원료 또는 팽창 액체 흐름을 제어하는 수단에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by the inflation fluid source or means to control inflation fluid flow
with means other than bag structure to diffuse or guide inflation fluid
Elongated tubular diffusers, e.g. curtain-type

title.ko: 가변적인 원료를 사용하는 것, 예. 복수 단계의 또는 제어된 출력(하이브리드 팽창기(inflator) B60R 21/272)
title.en: using a variable source, e.g. plural stage or controlled output (hybrid inflator B60R0021272000)

title.ko: 가스의 순간 발생에 의한 것, 예. 불꽃 (B60R 21/268이 우선)
title.en: using instantaneous generation of gas, e.g. pyrotechnic (B60R0021268000 takes precedence)
using instantaneous release of stored pressurised gas
with means for increasing the pressure of the gas just before or during liberation, e.g. hybrid inflators
characterised by means to rupture or open the fluid source
with means to vent the inflation fluid source, e.g. in case of overpressure
with means to draw ambient air into the flow line and mix such air with the inflation fluid
Arrangements for non-electric triggering of inflation
Protecting non-occupants of a vehicle, e.g. pedestrians
using airbags
using means for lifting bonnets

title.ko: 차량에 있어서 안전벨트 또는 신체장구
title.en: Safety belts or body harnesses in vehicles
Semi-passive restraint systems, e.g. systems applied or removed automatically but not both
Means for presenting the belt or part thereof to the wearer
Passive restraint systems, i.e. systems both applied and removed automatically, e.g. by movement of the vehicle door
having the belt or harness connected to a member slidable in a vehicle-mounted track
having the belt retractor mounted on or in a vehicle closure, e.g. the door
specially adapted for children or animals

title.ko: 벨트 또는 하네스의 구조(21/18이 우선)
title.en: Construction of belts or harnesses (B60R0021180000 takes precedence)
incorporating enlarged restraint areas, e.g. vests, nets
using belts which become permanently deformed, i.e. one time use
Anchoring devices
with stopping means for acting directly upon the belt in an emergency, e.g. by clamping or friction
with means for reducing belt tension during use under normal conditions
with means to tension the belt in an emergency
adjustable in position, e.g. in height
secured to the vehicle floor
secured to the side, door, or roof of the vehicle
secured to the seat
incorporating energy-absorbing devices
Coupling devices other than buckles, including length-adjusting fittings
Devices for releasing in an emergency, e.g. after an accident

title.ko: 벨트권취기, 예. 릴(reel) (비상시 벨트를 긴장시키는 수단을 가지고 있는 계지장치 22/195)

with electrically actuated locking means

the locking means being automatically actuated
in response to belt movement when a wearer applies the belt
in response to fastening of the belt buckle

title.ko: 긴급시 자체 록킹되는 것(22/343이 우선)

responsive only to belt movement
responsive only to vehicle movement
responsive to belt movement and vehicle movement
with additional means for preventing locking under predetermined conditions

having means for acting directly upon the belt, e.g. by clamping or friction
with means for reducing belt tension during use under normal conditions
with means to tension the belt in an emergency
Control systems, alarms, or interlock systems, for the correct application of the belt or harness

title.ko: 차량의 무단 사용 또는 도난을 방지하거나 표시하기 위한 부속품 또는 시스템(차량용 잠금장치 E05B77/00 ~ E05B85/00)
title.en: Fittings or systems for preventing or indicating unauthorised use or theft of vehicles (locks for vehicles E05B0077000000-E05B0085000000)

title.ko: 차량 시스템 또는 부품에서 동작하는 것, 예.작동문, 시트 또는 창문(앞유리)
title.en: operating on vehicle systems or fittings, e.g. on doors, seats or windscreens

title.ko: 조종장치에서 동작하는 것
title.en: operating on the steering mechanism
restraining movement of the steering column or steering wheel hub, e.g. restraining means controlled by ignition switch
using electric means, e.g. electric motors or solenoids

title.ko: 운전대에서 동작하는 것, 예. 조정휠 가장자리에 고정된 바(B60R 25/021 우선)

Countermeasures against the physical destruction of the steering lock
operating on the propulsion system, e.g. engine or drive motor
operating on the fuel supply
by blocking the exhaust
by limiting or blocking the air supply
by limiting or cutting the electrical supply to the propulsion unit
operating on the vehicle transmission
operating on brakes or brake systems
by restraining wheel rotation, e.g. wheel clamps
actuating a signalling device
a signal being sent to a remote location, e.g. a radio signal being transmitted to a police station, a security company or the owner
characterised by the type of theft warning signal, e.g. visual or audible signals with special characteristics
Means to switch the anti-theft system on or off
using hidden switches
using mechanical identifiers
using manual input of alphanumerical codes
using electronic identifiers containing a code not memorised by the user
using biometry
Detection related to theft or to other events relevant to anti-theft systems
of human presence inside or outside the vehicle
of vehicle dynamic parameters, e.g. speed or acceleration
of global position, e.g. by providing GPS coordinates
